  "findings": [
    "Motor disconnect is not within sight of the motor controller or motor location as required by code."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Relocate the disconnect switch to a location within sight of the motor and controller, or install a compliant lockable disconnect at the motor location."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Article 430.102 requires a disconnecting means to be located in sight from the controller location and the motor location. Since the disconnect is not within sight, it violates this safety standard and must be corrected before closeout.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 430.102(A)",
    "NEC Article 430.102(B)"
  ]
}
